title: Add Google Site Verification meta tag to index.html

requirements.summary: Add Google Site Verification meta tag to the head section of index.html
acceptanceCriteria: The `<head>` section of `frontend/index.html` contains exactly `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="xD35XIyzJcMzSAzDAaT9PFlXd6bn5Yfz5VAKoTrASTU" />`.
No existing meta tags or other head content are removed or modified.
The page still renders correctly after the change.

file_operations.description: Insert the Google Site Verification meta tag `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="xD35XIyzJcMzSAzDAaT9PFlXd6bn5Yfz5VAKoTrASTU" />` into the `<head>` section, positioned after the existing charset and viewport meta tags but before the SEO-related meta tags. Ensure no other content in the head section is altered.
